overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in Western attire exploring a misty mountain canyon. The character walks and runs along a narrow dirt trail beside a rushing river, surrounded by rocky cliffs and pine trees in foggy conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail under cliff overhang

events.description: character emerges from under rock overhang into open canyon as river comes into view
misty river valley becomes fully visible as fog slightly lifts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain trail, moving from sheltered overhang toward the river canyon

entered.detail: large rocky cliff overhang providing partial shelter over the trail
steep rocky mountain face rising on the left side of the canyon
fast-flowing mountain river with greenish water becoming visible through the mist
low green bushes and grasses along the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a large rock overhang in a misty mountain canyon. The character walks forward along a narrow dirt trail as the scene opens up to reveal a rushing river below. The fog creates a hazy atmosphere as the canyon walls frame the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canyon trail alongside mountain river

events.description: character briefly stops and looks around, raising hand to hat, then resumes walking
trail curves left bringing character closer to the river edge and passing tall pine trees

agents.ego_description: jogging along the canyon path, pausing momentarily to survey the surroundings before continuing

entered.detail: tall coniferous pine trees with thick trunks lining the right side of the trail
rocky riverbank with boulders along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves along an open section of the canyon trail with the river now clearly visible on the left. Tall pine trees line the path as the trail curves through the misty valley. The character briefly pauses to look around before continuing at a brisk pace.

events.description: canyon walls close in creating a narrower passage with steeper rock faces
sound and mist from river rapids or small waterfall becomes more prominent ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrowing trail carefully, staying close to the cliff wall as the canyon tightens

entered.detail: vertical cliff face with reddish-brown rock texture closing in on the right side
turbulent white water sections of the river visible through the mist

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows significantly as the character progresses, with steep rock walls closing in on both sides. The river runs turbulent and closer to the trail, with mist rising from the rapids ahead. The path becomes more rugged as it winds through the confined mountain passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty mountain canyon that shifts from an open river valley into a narrow, rugged gorge. It begins under a large rock overhang, moving forward along a narrow dirt trail as the view opens up to reveal a rushing river below framed by hazy canyon walls. As the character progresses, the scene expands into an open section of the trail lined with tall pine trees, where the river remains visible to the left through the drifting fog. The environment then shifts as the canyon narrows significantly, with steep rock walls closing in on both sides and the river becoming more turbulent. Finally, the path grows more rugged, winding through a confined mountain passage where mist rises directly from the rapids ahead.
